title: Beijing
subtitle: Beijing · 北京 · 5 routes
meta: China · imperial axis, hutongs, evening streets, and a Great Wall day
practicalNote: Spring and autumn are easier for full walking days. Summer heats open squares quickly and brings heavy rain; winter is cold and windy. Before leaving, check Tiananmen booking, the Palace Museum ticket, and the passport used for reservation: in central Beijing, access checks break the day more often than distance.

photo.alt: Пекинская ось на рассвете: серые крыши, красная стена и дальние горы
